message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.explode (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.explode (split a
delimited column into multiple rows):

- explode_pipe_keep_index: 2-row frame, "a|b|c" expands to 3 rows
  preserving the original integer row labels (duplicated as needed)
- explode_comma_ignore_index: 2-row utf8-indexed frame, "x,y" + "z"
  with ignore_index=True (resets to RangeIndex)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame[col].map(split) then frame.explode(col)), runs the Rust
DataFrame.explode_with_ignore_index(col, sep, ignore), and asserts
parity via compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameExplode was already
wired through the Frame response branch; this fills the live-oracle
test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-ecss7]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
